queries.question: For each production designer, list the element types they produce
queries.sql: select production_designers.name , elements.element_type from Production_Designers_Elements join Elements on Production_Designers_Elements.element_id = Elements.id join Production_Designers on Production_Designers_Elements.production_designer_id = Production_Designers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?element_type WHERE {
  ?production_designers_elements a :Production_Designers_Elements .
  ?elements a :Elements .
  ?production_designers_elements p:hasElements ?elements .
  ?production_designers a :Production_Designers .
  ?production_designers_elements p:hasProduction_Designers ?production_designers .
  ?production_designers p:name ?name .
  ?elements p:element_type ?element_type .
}

queries.question: List the element types that every production designer has.
queries.sql: SELECT Elements.element_type  from Production_Designers_Elements join Elements on Production_Designers_Elements.element_id = Elements.id join Production_Designers on Production_Designers_Elements.production_designer_id = Production_Designers.id   GROUP BY Production_Designers_Elements.element_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Production_Designers_Elements.production_designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Production_Designers)

queries.question: For every designer, what are the descriptions for elements they use
queries.sql: select production_designers.name , elements.description from Production_Designers_Elements join Elements on Production_Designers_Elements.element_id = Elements.id join Production_Designers on Production_Designers_Elements.production_designer_id = Production_Designers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?production_designers_elements a :Production_Designers_Elements .
  ?elements a :Elements .
  ?production_designers_elements p:hasElements ?elements .
  ?production_designers a :Production_Designers .
  ?production_designers_elements p:hasProduction_Designers ?production_designers .
  ?production_designers p:name ?name .
  ?elements p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What are the element descriptions that are common to all designers
queries.sql: SELECT Elements.description  from Production_Designers_Elements join Elements on Production_Designers_Elements.element_id = Elements.id join Production_Designers on Production_Designers_Elements.production_designer_id = Production_Designers.id   GROUP BY Production_Designers_Elements.element_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Production_Designers_Elements.production_designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Production_Designers)

queries.question: What are the element types and descriptions of elements common to all production designers?
queries.sql: SELECT Elements.element_type, Elements.description  from Production_Designers_Elements join Elements on Production_Designers_Elements.element_id = Elements.id join Production_Designers on Production_Designers_Elements.production_designer_id = Production_Designers.id   GROUP BY Production_Designers_Elements.element_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Production_Designers_Elements.production_designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Production_Designers)

queries.question: For each production designer, list the element types and descriptions of elements used.
queries.sql: select production_designers.name , elements.element_type , elements.description from Production_Designers_Elements join Elements on Production_Designers_Elements.element_id = Elements.id join Production_Designers on Production_Designers_Elements.production_designer_id = Production_Designers.id

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?element_type ?description WHERE {
  ?production_designers_elements a :Production_Designers_Elements .
  ?elements a :Elements .
  ?production_designers_elements p:hasElements ?elements .
  ?production_designers a :Production_Designers .
  ?production_designers_elements p:hasProduction_Designers ?production_designers .
  ?production_designers p:name ?name .
  ?elements p:element_type ?element_type .
  ?elements p:description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the element types that every production designer has.
What element descriptions do we have for every designer?
Tell me the element types and descriptions of elements every production designer uses.
